name: Dev Tools Stack
description: Essential development tools including Node.js and Python.
preWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Dev Tools Stack pre-workload: verifying system prerequisites...'
postWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Dev Tools Stack post-workload: finalizing installation...'
if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Node.js installed successfully' } else { Write-Warning 'Node.js not found on PATH' }
if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Python installed successfully' } else { Write-Warning 'Python not found on PATH' }
preUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'Dev Tools Stack pre-uninstall: preparing for removal...'
postUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'Dev Tools Stack post-uninstall: cleanup complete'

packages.name: nodejs-24.13.0
postInitSteps: if ($nodePath) { node --version } else { Write-Error 'node command not found' }

packages.name: python-3.14.4
postInitSteps: if ($pyPath) { python --version } else { Write-Error 'python command not found' }
if ($pipPath) { pip --version } else { Write-Warning 'pip not found' }

name: Runtime Environment
description: Base runtime with .NET and the deployment agent.

packages.name: dotnet-runtime-10.0.7
postInitSteps: if ($dotnet) { dotnet --version } else { Write-Error 'dotnet command not found' }

name: Utility Pack
description: Common utilities for archive management and version control.
preWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Utility Pack pre-workload: preparing system PATH...'
postWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Utility Pack post-workload: all utilities installed'
preUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'Utility Pack pre-uninstall: preparing utilities for removal...'

packages.name: git-2.48.1
postInitSteps: if ($git) { git --version } else { Write-Error 'git command not found' }

name: DBMS Workload
description: Database management tools with GUI installers for interactive testing.
preWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'DBMS Workload pre-workload: checking for running database tools...'
postWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'DBMS Workload post-workload: all DB tools installed'
preUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'DBMS Workload pre-uninstall: closing database tools...'

packages.name: dbeaver-24.3.0
preInitSteps: if ($dbeavProcs.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host 'WARNING: DBeaver is running - close before upgrade' }
postInitSteps: if (Test-Path $dbeavExe) { Write-Host 'DBeaver executable found' } else { Write-Warning 'DBeaver not found at expected path' }

packages.name: notepadplusplus-8.7.5
preInitSteps: if ($nppProcs.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host 'Notepad++ is running - close before upgrade' }
postInitSteps: if (Test-Path $nppExe) { Write-Host 'Notepad++ executable found' } else { Write-Warning 'Notepad++ not found at expected path' }

name: Editor Workload
description: Lightweight text editor with a GUI installer for interactive testing.
preWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Editor Workload pre-workload: preparing editor environment...'
postWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Editor Workload post-workload: editor installation complete'

packages.name: notepadplusplus-8.7.5
preInitSteps: if ($nppProcs.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host 'Notepad++ is running - requesting close...' }
postInitSteps: if (Test-Path $nppExe) { Write-Host 'Editor installed successfully' } else { Write-Warning 'Editor not found at expected path' }

name: Amazing Workload
description: A workload that includes a database management tool and a programming language.
preWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Amazing Workload pre-workload: preparing development environment...'
postWorkloadSteps: Write-Host 'Amazing Workload post-workload: development environment ready'
Write-Host 'Summary: DBeaver + Python + SSMS installed and verified'
preUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'Amazing Workload pre-uninstall: preparing environment for removal...'
postUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'Summary: Database tools and Python removed'

packages.name: dbeaver-26.0.3
preInitSteps: if ($dbeavProcs.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host 'WARNING: DBeaver is running - close before upgrade' }
postInitSteps: if (Test-Path $dbeavExe) { Write-Host 'DBeaver installed' } else { Write-Warning 'DBeaver not found' }

packages.name: python-3.14.4
postInitSteps: if ($pyPath) { python --version } else { Write-Error 'python command not found' }

name: SSMS Workload
description: Workload focused on SQL Server Management Studio with a GUI installer for interactive testing.
preUninstallSteps: Write-Host 'SSMS Workload pre-uninstall: preparing environment for removal...'

packages.name: ssms-22.5.2
preInitSteps: if (Test-Path $ssmsExe) { Write-Host "Existing SSMS 22 found at: $ssmsExe" } else { Write-Host 'No existing SSMS 22 installation - proceeding with fresh install' }
postInitSteps: if (Test-Path $ssmsExe) { Write-Host 'SSMS 22.5.2 installed successfully' } else { Write-Warning 'SSMS 22.5.2 not found at expected path' }
